title: Pan-Seared Octopus with Peruvian Crispy Fries
description: A French-inspired dish combining tender pan-seared octopus with crispy fries and a flavorful Peruvian twist.
instructions: Heat vegetable oil to 350°F in a deep frying pan or a deep fryer.
Cut potatoes into long, thin strips and fry until golden brown.
Drain fries and season with salt, black pepper, garlic powder, and paprika.
In a separate pan, heat a couple of tablespoons of oil over medium-high heat.
Add octopus and cook for 2-3 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Transfer octopus to a plate and squeeze lime juice over the top.
Serve with crispy fries and garnish with chopped cilantro.
If using, add a sliced Peruvian Aji Amarillo pepper to the plate for added heat.
